title: Gamma Creatures
description: Tamable and rideable creatures, new saddles for each creature, new blocks, ores, biomes, and items
body:
![portada](https://i.imgur.com/Sp2esSu.jpg)![Gamma Creatures]
Requires GeckoLib mod

 

These creatures spawn around the world,

You will have to defeat them and then you can tame them,

Each creature possesses gamma energy, which allows them to have certain abilities,

Creatures have a Stamina system, which when finished can be regenerated with an item called "Stamina Capsule".

 

To tame them you must consult the guide book to know what type of tameo you need.
